message: Hmm.
This tea is delicious! I love this kind!
Watching the cute daughter smile happily gives me an illusion of happiness myself.
But that's just an illusion. Even if she is happy, it doesn't mean that I will be.
You really are good at making tea.
Instead of answering, I return the smile.
Oh come on, don’t make that face.
You shouldn’t be shy! Hehe.
Ah, that.
Oh no, why?
She slips the cup from her delicate hand.
Oh no, I did it again.
Oops!
W-What?
Her beautiful eyelids are closed, and her body slowly falls from the sofa to the floor.
It looks like a stunning dance scene viewed in slow motion,
beautiful enough to delight my eyes.
Go ahead and fall into a deep, deep sleep. You probably won't feel much fear if you sleep,
If there had been plenty of time, this wouldn't have happened.
I even thought of you as dear.
However, time cruelly does not allow that.
If everything isn't finished before spring comes, the future won't come to this world.
Until the day I kneel before God and face the Final Judgment, I have discarded my being for God and for this world.
I expose my beloved's thigh and take out a new scalpel.
The scalpel tears the skin, the cold blade piercing through the sticky flesh.
I felt a jolt.
For a moment, she convulsed all over.
Even though she shouldn’t be feeling pain, why is that?
After some hesitation, I began to dismantle her left leg.
I obtained the left leg; there’s only one left.
